title: Philips Ruins x Bare Bones
description: Give your Ruins some more flavor with the Bare Bone-like style!
body:
what happens when you combine Philips Ruins and the Bare Bones texture pack?
well thats what this resource pack is all about! this turns your normal looking textures from
this...
![shows image of normal textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d3481baaca0ed98d454a8cf4764a8bb6807d798.png)
...to this!
![shows image of Barebones textures which are more simplistic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04652da830238f1008fea8d094f57eabd2bd5a2c.png)


Philips Ruins X Bare Bones aims to recreate the classic BareBones style created by RobotPants for the blocks/items in Philips Ruins!


you may be asking...

what is Bare Bones?
       or
What is Philips Ruins? 

well, Bare Bones is a resource pack with the purpose of bringing your world and the default Minecraft textures to it's 'bare bones'. It is a simplistic and vibrant pack that is fun to use and makes your own Minecraft worlds look colourful! and Philip’s Ruins is a Minecraft ruins generator mod for Forge and Fabric, and it supports the latest Minecraft versions to date. The mod adds over 190 different types of ruin variants to the game, each with their own unique custom loot tables.

Thank you for 100 downloads!
